untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparing shadow height percentage to a statistical median from a reference table (Table 22.4), which cannot be expressed as a simple indicator condition. The exact median threshold and shadow calculation methodology are not provided in the source text.
translation_notes: Translated tall shadow concept using upper_wick > lower_wick (long upper shadow) and lower_wick > upper_wick (long lower shadow). Volume confirmation added based on stated requirement that volume trend should follow breakout direction. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both bullish (tall upper shadow) and bearish (tall lower shadow) interpretations. Note: The precise statistical comparison to median shadow heights cannot be replicated without access to the referenced table.
